children.text: the name and address of the transferee and transferor in such exchange, and
such other information as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Statements to be furnished to transferor and transferee
children.label: b Statements to be furnished to transferor and transferee

children.text: the name, address, and phone number of the information contact of the partnership required to make such return, and
the information required to be shown on the return with respect to such person.

children.heading: Requirement that transferor notify partnership
children.label: c Requirement that transferor notify partnership

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: In the case of any exchange described in subsection (a), the transferor of the partnership interest shall promptly notify the partnership of such exchange.

children.heading: Partnership not required to make return until notice
children.label: 2 Partnership not required to make return until notice
children.text: A partnership shall not be required to make a return under this section with respect to any exchange until the partnership is notified of such exchange.
